description: The Engineering Director wants to improve data quality for the 'TailwindTraders' project to ensure velocity charts are accurate. Create a new inherited process named 'Tailwind Agile' based on the system 'Agile' process and apply it to the 'TailwindTraders' project. Within this new process, implement a rule for 'User Story' work items named 'Require Points on Close' that makes the 'Story Points' field mandatory whenever a story's 'State' is changed to 'Closed'. Verify the implementation by assigning 5 points to the existing 'Implement Login' User Story and successfully transitioning it to the 'Closed' state.
